O2-FM-01: changed-wording routines with the same intended action
action-selection checks that reduce imitation-only success
separate routine cue from oral-language cue
O2-FM-02: single-action directions before rebuilding multi-part sequence
small sequence routines with explicit order language
O2-FM-03: spoken language paired with concrete referents
closely related rewording after the first attempt
O2-FM-04: same meaning target with changed speaker or setting
varied routine surface with stable comprehension target
deliberate movement from familiar to less familiar contexts
